queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Microsoft Teams' AND publisher = 'Microsoft Corporation';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Microsoft Teams' AND publisher = 'Microsoft Corporation' AND version_compare(version, '26163.405.4842.717') < 0);
queries.open: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM processes WHERE LOWER(name) = 'teams.exe');
